commands.review_summary:
The PR adds schema version 2 of `qa-evidence-summary.json`, embeds normalized evidence in QA suite output, replaces four live-transport summaries, and migrates Mantis, RTT, Docker, workflow, docs, and test consumers.

PR surface: Source +803, Tests +955, Docs 0, Config +18, Generated 0, Other +242. Total +2018 across 37 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from exact-head source: Slack live writes `qa-evidence-summary.json`, while the Slack desktop failure-diagnostics collector and test still expect `slack-qa-summary.json`. This read-only review did not execute the remote Slack lane.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical repair can update the stale Slack collector and its test; the contributor must still provide real setup proof and maintainers must decide the stacked contract.
